title: User air purifier preference and device status
summary: The user prefers activating the air purifier when indoor air quality is perceived as poor, dislikes noise from higher air purifier fan speeds, and all user-requested operations on the user's Mijia Smart Air Purifier 5 including the recent executed fan speed increase request completed successfully.
details: User prefers activating air purifier when indoor air quality is poor
